markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members on GrowthX's customer use cases and service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX focuses primarily on editorial content creation and programmatic SEO to drive organic traffic growth for B2B clients](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [The company is selective about taking on custom work, preferring to stick to repeatable processes for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Strategy sprints (20-30k) are used to align on objectives and determine appropriate ongoing monthly engagement costs](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [While currently top-of-funnel focused, there's interest in expanding more into mid/bottom-funnel content like case studies](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)

## Topics

### Client Pain Points & Value Proposition

  - [Many clients overly reliant on paid search with diminishing returns](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [GrowthX helps broaden channel mix, particularly organic, more cost-effectively](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [End-to-end creation, strategy, and execution allows faster growth and signal](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Typical client profile: Looking to scale beyond paid, struggling with organic](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Core Service Offerings

  - [Editorial content: Primary focus, 5-10 articles/week, $9-15k/month](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO: Templated pages at scale, similar pricing to editorial](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Custom work: Occasionally taken on but often regretted due to resource drain](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Strategy sprints: 20-30k to align on objectives and determine ongoing costs](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

### Content Types & Approach

  - [Editorial: Longer-form blog posts tailored to client personas](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Programmatic: Scalable templated pages (e.g. per diem calculators for RAMP)](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Experimenting with repurposing client webinars/podcasts into articles](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Primarily top-of-funnel focus currently, but interest in more mid/bottom-funnel](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)

### AI/LLM Considerations

  - [Rapid visibility possible in AI-generated results (e.g. AugmentCode example)](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)
  - [Exploring how to craft content knowing it may be directly quoted by AI](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue refining strategy for evolving client engagements at 6+ month mark](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2218.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to expand into more mid/bottom-funnel content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Consider how to measure and report on AI/LLM visibility and performance](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)
  - [Evaluate potential to offer more social media content creation services in future](https://fathom.video/share/Mkqsym8X3rGSr_hycXvBByhYxfNhXnyx?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)
